_comment: Reduced KW-Pareto seed artifact (Stage 1, DECISION D). Hand-transcribed from the authoritative consolidated analysis HTML so that every eval-grounded metadata row is AUDITABLE and a future refresh is a script re-derivation, not archaeology. A full extraction script that regenerates this JSON directly from the analysis run is OUT OF SCOPE for this run (tracked as a follow-up). Cost trust window: only runs >= 2026-05-14 have trustworthy cost (cache-token provenance); the 260609 frontier uses the clean post-05-14 set.

configs.note: Best value point on the 260609 frontier — ~Sonnet-class quality at ~1/7 the cost. The RE:[low,low,low] config is the strongest DeepSeek-Flash working-role configuration.
Frontier point (cheaper config); lower compound than the RE:[low,low,low] config. Best-config tier uses the higher 3.85.
Quality ceiling on the 260609 frontier (capable working model + cheap Haiku background — a real Pareto win).
Strong but dominated by Opus-4-7+haiku-background (higher compound at lower cost).

Weak as a working model (33-43% pass) but excellent as a cheap background tier. meanCostUsd is an order-of-magnitude estimate (the analysis reported it as a cheap background point, not a precise working-model cost).

Strong quality, dominated PURELY on raw cost (~26x the frontier). Cost domination FLIPS when the user has an effectively-free subscription (ChatGPT Pro / Mindstone) — handled at effective-cost time, not in this static quality figure.

Cheapest frontier point but PARTIAL coverage AND high variance (a separate run scored 0.00 — a crash, NOT a quality signal, and explicitly NOT ingested here). valueClass:'frontier-partial', never plain 'frontier' (DECISION D).
